framework.name: Supply-First Marketplace Strategy
framework.description: Marketplaces succeed by solving supply aggregation first, then letting demand follow naturally. 99.9% of successful marketplaces focus on finding unique ways to acquire and aggregate supply that competitors cannot replicate. The supply side is typically the constraint, not demand.
framework.raw_quote: whatever Marketplace we're looking at we really think supplies supply supplies so can that business find a better way of acquiring an aggregating Supply than anyone else can't... if they find the right Supply demand will follow
